comment: End-to-end fixture: synthetic MFT transcript 4 (8 threads, 9 asks). First exercise of the Answered metric: '>' quoted lines are thread replies that must attach to their parent (answered = 3: timeout, SHA-256, auto-purge) and must NEVER be extracted as questions (the T5 reply is itself a question — a responder's clarifying question is not an ask). Promises ('let me check') and clarifying questions do NOT count as answers; T6 proves answered is per-question, not per-thread (same message: retention unanswered, auto-purge answered). Also the tokenization stress: 10.15.2 / approx. / i.e. / e.g. in one sentence, and a URL + '10.15 CF19' in another — each must stay ONE whole question. See mft_test_answer_key_4.md.

message_asks.contains: Two things for the wM MFT
